overview: Cuttlefish is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 10 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 200.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Marked
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Marked icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 200 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 200 units, loses target at 1000 units, 180° vision angle.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 200 units. Loses target at 1000 units.
